ops.text: The writing-docs delegation guard (PreToolUse:Workflow hook) misfired on a smoke-test workflow brief: the agent prompt says "write a README" meaning a one-line fixture file committed to a scratch /tmp git repo (rm -rf'd at cleanup) so `git commit` has content — not documentation prose. The hook demanded the subagent read the writing-docs skill before writing it. Condition should exclude briefs where the README/prose target is an ephemeral test fixture (e.g. under /tmp, followed by cleanup/deletion steps).
